query:
CREATE TABLE performance_goals (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  performanceReviewId INT NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  category ENUM('performance', 'development', 'project', 'behavioral') DEFAULT 'performance' NOT NULL,
  measurableTarget TEXT,
  targetDate TIMESTAMP,
  weight INT DEFAULT 1,
  status ENUM('not_started', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'exceeded', 'not_met', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'not_started' NOT NULL,
  progressPercent INT DEFAULT 0,
  progressNotes TEXT,
  selfRating INT,
  managerRating INT,
  managerComments TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  performanceReviewId INT NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  category ENUM('performance', 'development', 'project', 'behavioral') DEFAULT 'performance' NOT NULL,

  progressPercent INT DEFAULT 0,
  progressNotes TEXT,
  selfRating INT,
  managerRating INT,
  managerComments TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
